name: recon-kit-mcp
description: Safe, structured network & security reconnaissance tools (DNS, WHOIS, TLS, HTTP security headers) for AI coding agents — each with a graded verdict.
long_description: An MCP server that gives AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cline) read-only network and security reconnaissance tools: recon_report (one-call DNS+TLS+headers overview with an overall grade), dns_recon, tls_check, http_headers_audit, and port_scan. Returns clean JSON with letter grades. For authorized testing, CTF, and education only.
